display.purpose: Recommended price output only. The single most important data point on screen.

headline.purpose: Item name output, section headings, tab names.

title.purpose: Card headings, above-field labels for grouped inputs.

label.purpose: Form labels, metadata tags, confidence badges. Always uppercase.

mono.purpose: Prices, percentages, item IDs, timestamps. All numeric data.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Interactive card hover state. Never at rest.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus indicator on buttons and inputs.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Output panel fade-in, accordion, tab switch.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA: Analyze Item, Track This Item, Schedule Check.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #1a56db; color: #fff; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1447c2; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26,86,219,0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #1040b0; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #111110; padding: 10px 20px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #e4e3df; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), border-color 150ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f8f7f5; border-color: #c8c7c3; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26,86,219,0.25); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: eBay Item ID field, image upload label.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6b6b67; } .ds-input { background: #ffffff; color: #111110; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1px solid #e4e3df; border-radius: 4px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #a8a8a4; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #1a56db; } .ds-input:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(26,86,219,0.25); }

components.name: Output Panel
components.description: Labeled panel that populates progressively as the agent produces output.
components.css: .ds-output-panel { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-output-label { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6b6b67; } .ds-output-value { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e4e3df; border-radius: 6px; padding: 16px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #111110; min-height: 48px; animation: ds-fadein 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1) both; } .ds-output-price { font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3rem); font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1.1; padding: 20px; } @keyframes ds-fadein { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(4px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

components.name: Confidence Badge
components.description: Signals whether Gemini + Google Lens agree on item identification.
components.html: 94%Signals agree
components.css: .ds-confidence { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-confidence--agree { background: #edfaf3; color: #1a7f4b; } .ds-confidence--disagree { background: #fef9ee; color: #b45309; } .ds-confidence-pct { font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; } .ds-confidence-label { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Tab Bar
components.description: Primary navigation between Price & List and Tracked Items.
components.html: <nav class="ds-tabs"><button class="ds-tab ds-tab--active">Price & List</button><button class="ds-tab">Tracked Items</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e3df; gap: 0; } .ds-tab { background: none; border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; padding: 12px 20px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; color: #6b6b67; cursor: pointer; margin-bottom: -1px; transition: color 150ms, border-color 150ms; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #111110; } .ds-tab--active { color: #111110; font-weight: 600; border-bottom-color: #1a56db; }

components.name: Data Table Row
components.description: Tracked items table — prices and drift in mono, semantic drift color.
components.html:
Item IDTitleListedMarketDrift
186123456789Apple iPhone 12 64GB Black$219.99$235.00+6.8%
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-table th { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6b6b67; padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e3df; text-align: left; } .ds-row td { font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #111110; padding: 14px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e3df; } .ds-row:hover td { background: #f8f7f5; } .ds-mono { font-family: 'Geist Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; } .ds-drift--up { color: #1a7f4b; } .ds-drift--down { color: #b45309; }

narrative.overview:
A clean, light workspace where an expert has laid out evidence and reached a verdict. The UI surfaces agent intelligence with the same authority a Sotheby's appraiser uses to quote a price: no hesitation, no hedging, no decoration. The recommended price is the hero. The confidence score is the backing evidence.

The surface is warm off-white — not clinical white, not dark. The accent is a precise slate-blue, used only when something is interactive or confirmed. Data labels are small-caps. Prices are large, weight 700, Geist Mono.

This system rejects: rounded icon-grid cards from 2018 SaaS dashboards, teal+orange palettes, tooltip-heavy dense tables, and anything that signals 'demo.'
keyCharacteristics: Committed light surface: warm off-white base, pure white raised panels
One accent, precisely used: slate-blue on interactive elements only
Choreographed output: agent results reveal progressively as each step completes
Humanist sans throughout: Plus Jakarta Sans
Mono for data: prices, IDs, percentages in Geist Mono
Flat by default: no shadows at rest

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Precision Blue is used for interactive elements and confirmed states only. A screen with 85% neutrals and 15% blue is correct. A screen with 40% blue is broken.

rules.name: The No Warm-Cool Split Rule
rules.body: The palette is warm-neutral throughout. No cool grays, no blue-tinted surfaces, no competing temperature zones.

rules.name: The Price Is Display Rule
rules.body: The recommended price always renders at Display scale, weight 700, in Geist Mono. Nothing else on the screen uses Display.

rules.name: The Mono-For-Numbers Rule
rules.body: Every numeric value (price, confidence percentage, item ID, drift) renders in Geist Mono. The visual distinction signals 'this is a data point, not prose.'

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No element has a shadow at rest. Elevation is earned by state change (hover, focus, open). A card that always has a shadow is using decoration to signal importance.

dos: Do render the recommended price at Display scale (clamp 2–3rem, weight 700, Geist Mono).
Do use square corners (0–4px) for interactive elements.
Do use Plus Jakarta Sans for prose and Geist Mono for all numeric data.
Do reveal agent output progressively with fade-in (200ms ease-out).
Do show confidence score and signal-agreement status prominently, directly below item name.
Do keep accent blue on ≤15% of any screen surface.
Do use warm off-white (#f8f7f5) as the page background. Never pure #fff or #000.
Do label every output field with uppercase Label-scale text in Muted Ink above it.
donts: Don't use rounded icon-grid cards (icon + heading + paragraph × N). Prohibited.
Don't use teal, orange, or any warm-cool palette split.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Single solid color only.
Don't apply shadows at rest. Flat by default.
Don't use border-left as a colored stripe on cards for decoration.
Don't put the recommended price in body text. Display scale only.
Don't use tooltips as the primary way to surface information.
Don't use animated spinners — use skeleton/shimmer on output panels instead.
Don't make it look like a Gradio app, Hugging Face Space, or any ML demo toy.
